requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence — SAZ Conformity and Zimbabwe Project Files
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全证据——SAZ合格评定及津巴布韦项目文件
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全證據——SAZ合格評定及辛巴威項目文件

summary.en: Zimbabwe solar PV inverter projects should treat IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 type-test evidence as the core electrical-safety file for power converters. SAZ develops and publishes Zimbabwean standards and provides standards, certification, and conformity services; Zimbabwe projects may require SAZ-recognised standards evidence, product certification, or consignment-based conformity assessment depending on the import and procurement route. Safety evidence should cover the exact inverter model or family, ratings, firmware-relevant configuration, labels, installation manual, environmental assumptions, and any battery-coupled operating mode.
summary.zh: 津巴布韦太阳能光伏逆变器项目应将IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2型式试验证据作为功率变换设备电气安全文件的核心。SAZ负责制定和发布津巴布韦标准，并提供标准、认证和合格评定服务；根据进口和采购路径，津巴布韦项目可能要求SAZ认可的标准证据、产品认证或按批次合格评定。安全证据应覆盖准确的逆变器型号或系列、额定参数、与固件相关的配置、标签、安装手册、环境假设以及任何与电池耦合的运行模式。
summary.zht: 辛巴威太陽能光伏逆變器項目應將IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2型式試驗證據作為功率轉換設備電氣安全文件的核心。SAZ負責制定和發布辛巴威標準，並提供標準、認證和合格評定服務；根據進口和採購路徑，辛巴威項目可能要求SAZ認可的標準證據、產品認證或按批次合格評定。安全證據應覆蓋準確的逆變器型號或系列、額定參數、與韌體相關的配置、標籤、安裝手冊、環境假設以及任何與電池耦合的運行模式。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
SAZ standards, certification, product certification, and conformity assessment services where applicable to the import or project route

summary.en: China-side PV inverter safety and performance files commonly reference GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, voluntary CQC or CGC certificates, CB reports, CNAS laboratory reports, and factory quality records. These documents can help build the Zimbabwe technical file, but a China GB/T certificate alone should not be treated as SAZ conformity, IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test coverage, ZERA licensing evidence, or ZETDC connection approval.
summary.zh: 中国侧光伏逆变器安全和性能文件通常引用GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、自愿性CQC或CGC证书、CB报告、CNAS实验室报告及工厂质量记录。这些文件可用于支持津巴布韦技术文件，但仅有中国GB/T证书不应被视为SAZ合格评定、IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验覆盖、ZERA许可证据或ZETDC并网批准。
summary.zht: 中國側光伏逆變器安全和性能文件通常引用GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、自願性CQC或CGC證書、CB報告、CNAS實驗室報告及工廠品質記錄。這些文件可用於支持辛巴威技術文件，但僅有中國GB/T證書不應被視為SAZ合格評定、IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗覆蓋、ZERA許可證據或ZETDC併網批准。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范
CQC / CGC voluntary PV inverter certification and CB reports, where available

gap.en: The gap is safety-standard mapping and local conformity acceptance. Prepare IEC 62109-1/-2 certificates and reports for the exact inverter model, then map labels, manuals, environmental limits, protective functions, and battery interfaces to the Zimbabwe project file. Confirm with SAZ, the importer, and the project owner whether SAZ certification or consignment-based conformity assessment is required before shipment.
gap.zh: 差距在于安全标准映射和本地合格评定接受。应准备覆盖准确逆变器型号的IEC 62109-1/-2证书和报告，并将标签、手册、环境限值、保护功能及电池接口映射到津巴布韦项目文件。出货前应向SAZ、进口商和项目业主确认是否需要SAZ认证或按批次合格评定。
gap.zht: 差距在於安全標準映射和本地合格評定接受。應準備覆蓋準確逆變器型號的IEC 62109-1/-2證書和報告，並將標籤、手冊、環境限值、保護功能及電池介面映射到辛巴威項目文件。出貨前應向SAZ、進口商和項目業主確認是否需要SAZ認證或按批次合格評定。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice where SAZ conformity, importer due diligence, project-owner procurement, insurer, lender, ZERA licensing, or ZETDC connection review requires recognised inverter safety evidence; confirm the current SAZ route for the specific shipment and project.
mandatory_status.cn: Not equivalent — China GB/T, CQC, CGC, or CNAS files do not by themselves create Zimbabwe SAZ conformity or ZERA/ZETDC acceptance.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not rely on China GB/T 37408-2021 or NB/T 32004 safety files as automatic Zimbabwe acceptance. Build a Zimbabwe technical file around IEC 62109-1/-2 evidence and confirm the SAZ conformity route before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应将中国GB/T 37408-2021或NB/T 32004安全文件视为津巴布韦自动接受依据。应围绕IEC 62109-1/-2证据建立津巴布韦技术文件，并在出货前确认SAZ合格评定路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應將中國GB/T 37408-2021或NB/T 32004安全文件視為辛巴威自動接受依據。應圍繞IEC 62109-1/-2證據建立辛巴威技術文件，並在出貨前確認SAZ合格評定路徑。
